Q1 2026 Earnings Call - Meta Investor Relations
META Earnings Preview: Q1 2026 on April 29 | Meyka

summary: Q1 2026 just reported April 29 AH. Actual EPS $10.44 vs $6.65 est (57% beat). Revenue $56.31B vs $55.45B est (+1.4%). Next earnings (Q2 2026) likely late July 2026. No official Q2 date announced yet.
